mapper.select: SELECT ttmd.user_id, ttmd.comp_id, tci.comp_nm, ttmd.task_year, ttmd.task_month, ttmd.task_day, ttmd.task_seq, ttmd.detail_seq, ttmd.task_detail_div, ttmd.task_detail_content, ttmd.task_detail_user_chk, ttmd.task_detail_user_chk_dt, ttmd.req_user_id, ttmd.req_dt, ttmd.req_info_key, ttmd.req_menu_id, ttmd.complete_dt, ttmd.cancel_dt, tui.user_nm as req_user_nm, tsm.router_nm as router_nm, case when tsm_grand_parent.menu_nm is not null then tsm_grand_parent.menu_nm || '>' || tsm.menu_nm when tsm_parent.menu_nm is not null then tsm_parent.menu_nm || '>' || tsm.menu_nm else tsm.menu_nm end as req_menu_nm FROM esg.tb_task_manager_detail ttmd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_company_info tci ON ttmd.comp_id = tci.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info tui ON ttmd.req_user_id = tui.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu tsm ON ttmd.req_menu_id = tsm.menu_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu tsm_parent ON tsm.up_menu_id = tsm_parent.menu_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu tsm_grand_parent ON tsm_parent.up_menu_id = tsm_grand_parent.menu_id WHERE ttmd.task_detail_user_id = #{searchText} AND ttmd.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttmd.req_dt BETWEEN to_timestamp(#{searchFrom} || ' 000000', 'yyyyMMdd HH24MISS') AND to_timestamp(#{searchTo} || ' 235959', 'yyyyMMdd HH24MISS') AND ttmd.cancel_dt IS null AND ttmd.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY ttmd.complete_dt IS NOT NULL, ttmd.req_dt DESC

SELECT ttmd.* FROM esg.tb_task_manager ttm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_task_manager_detail ttmd ON ttm.comp_id = ttmd.comp_id AND ttm.task_year = ttmd.task_year AND ttm.task_month = ttmd.task_month AND ttm.task_day = ttmd.task_day AND ttm.task_seq = ttmd.task_seq WHERE ttm.req_info_key = #{reqInfoKey} AND ttm.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttmd.task_detail_div LIKE 'sign%' AND ttmd.cancel_dt IS NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM esg.tb_approval_info WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id=#{targetId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(task_seq), 0) + 1 AS taskSeq FROM esg.tb_task_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND task_year = #{taskYear} AND task_month = #{taskMonth} AND task_day = #{taskDay}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_task_manager ( clnt_id, user_id, comp_id, task_year, task_month, task_day, task_seq, task_content, task_user_chk, task_user_chk_dt, req_user_id, req_dt, req_info_key, req_menu_id, complete_dt ) VALUES ( #{clntId}, #{userId}, #{compId}, #{taskYear}, #{taskMonth}, #{taskDay}, #{taskSeq}, #{taskContent},
#{taskUserChk}, now(),
'N', #{taskUserChkDt},
#{reqUserId}, now(), #{reqInfoKey}, #{reqMenuId},
NOW()
NULL
)

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(detail_seq), 0) + 1 AS detailSeq FROM esg.tb_task_manager_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND task_year = #{taskYear} AND task_month = #{taskMonth} AND task_day = #{taskDay} AND task_seq = #{taskSeq}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_task_manager_detail ( user_id, comp_id, task_year, task_month, task_day, task_seq, detail_seq, task_detail_div, task_detail_content, task_detail_user_id, task_detail_user_chk, task_detail_user_chk_dt, req_user_id, req_dt, req_info_key, req_menu_id, complete_dt, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{compId}, #{taskYear}, #{taskMonth}, #{taskDay}, #{taskSeq}, #{detailSeq}, #{taskDetailDiv}, #{taskDetailContent}, (SELECT user_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{taskDetailHrId}),
#{taskDetailUserChk}, now(),
'N', #{taskDetailUserChkDt},
#{reqUserId}, now(), #{reqInfoKey}, #{reqMenuId},
NOW(),
NULL,
#{useYn} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_hse_job_assignment WHERE write_year = CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) AS VARCHAR) AND doc_type = 'JOB'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hse_job_assignment ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, hr_id, use_yn, comp_id, created_at, created_by ) SELECT CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) AS VARCHAR), #{docNo}, 'JOB', thi.hr_id, 'Y', #{compId}, now(), #{createdBy} FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi WHERE thi.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{taskDetailHrId}) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_hse_job_assignment thja WHERE thja.write_year = CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) AS VARCHAR) AND thja.hr_id = thi.hr_id );
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_task_manager_detail ttmd SET task_detail_user_chk = 'Y', task_detail_user_chk_dt = NOW() FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai, esg.tb_common_d tdcd WHERE ttmd.task_detail_user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info WHERE hr_id = #{userId}) AND ttmd.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttmd.req_info_key = #{reqInfoKey} AND ttmd.task_detail_user_chk_dt IS NULL AND ttmd.task_detail_div = #{taskDetailDiv} AND ttmd.cancel_dt IS NULL AND tai.target_type = split_part(ttmd.req_info_key, '^&', 1) AND tai.target_id = replace(regexp_replace(ttmd.req_info_key, '^[^&]+\^&', ''), '^&', '') AND tai.param = tdcd.extra_2 AND tdcd.minor_cd = ttmd.task_detail_div AND tdcd.major_cd = 'C0044';

UPDATE esg.tb_task_manager_detail ttmd SET cancel_dt = NOW(), task_detail_content = #{taskDetailContent} FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai, esg.tb_common_d tdcd WHERE 1 = 1 AND ttmd.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttmd.req_info_key = #{reqInfoKey} AND ttmd.task_detail_div = #{taskDetailDiv} AND ttmd.cancel_dt IS NULL AND ttmd.complete_dt IS NULL AND tai.target_type = split_part(ttmd.req_info_key, '^&', 1) AND tai.target_id = replace(regexp_replace(ttmd.req_info_key, '^[^&]+\^&', ''), '^&', '') AND tai.param = tdcd.extra_2 AND tdcd.minor_cd = ttmd.task_detail_div AND tdcd.major_cd = 'C0044';
mapper.select: SELECT tsc.inspection_cycle FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log tsil LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist tsc ON tsil.std_eq_id = tsc.std_eq_id AND tsil.comp_id = tsc.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment tdt ON tdt.std_eq_id = tsil.std_eq_id AND tdt.comp_id = tsil.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info tei ON tei.equipment_id = tsil.equipment_id

SELECT A.comp_id , A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , B.doc_seq , F.doc_seq_detail , A.orgn_id , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , A.revised_dt , A.enacted_dt , COUNT(DISTINCT B.doc_seq) AS doc_count , COUNT(CASE WHEN F.use_yn = 'Y' THEN F.doc_seq END) AS res_count , A.use_yn , B.hr_id , G.user_id , H.clnt_id , (CASE WHEN E.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN D.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'I' WHEN C.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'W' ELSE 'C' END) AS approval_status FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail B ON B.doc_type = A.doc_type AND B.doc_no = A.doc_no AND B.orgn_id = A.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info C ON C.target_type = 'KPR' AND C.target_id = A.write_year||A.doc_no AND C.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info D ON D.target_type = 'KPR' AND D.target_id = A.write_year||A.doc_no AND D.param = 'reviewer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info E ON E.target_type = 'KPR' AND E.target_id = A.write_year||A.doc_no AND E.param = 'approver' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result F ON B.doc_no = F.doc_no AND B.write_year = F.write_year AND B.doc_seq = F.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info G ON B.created_by = G.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info H ON G.user_id = H.user_id WHERE A.use_yn = 'Y' and B.use_yn='Y' AND ( 1 != 1
or B.action_schedule1 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule2 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule3 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule4 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule5 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule6 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule7 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule8 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule9 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule10 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule11 = 'Y'
or B.action_schedule12 = 'Y'
) AND ( 1 = 1
AND B.action_schedule1 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule2 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule3 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule4 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule5 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule6 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule7 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule8 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule9 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule10 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule11 != 'Y'
AND B.action_schedule12 != 'Y'
) GROUP BY A.comp_id, A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id, E.signature, D.signature, C.signature, B.hr_id, B.doc_seq, F.doc_seq_detail, G.user_id, H.clnt_id ORDER BY A.WRITE_YEAR DESC,A.CREATED_AT DESC;

select tkpr.*, thi.hr_nm from esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result tkpr LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi on tkpr.hr_id = thi.hr_id where tkpr.doc_seq = #{docSeq} and tkpr.doc_no = #{docNo} order by tkpr.created_at

select tkpr.*, thi.hr_nm , tkpr.hr_id, B.comp_id, thi.user_id, h.clnt_id from esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result tkpr LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi on tkpr.created_by = thi.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail B ON B.doc_no = tkpr.doc_no AND B.write_year = tkpr.write_year AND B.doc_seq = tkpr.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info H on thi.user_id = H.user_id where ( 1 != 1
or tkpr.action_result1 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result2 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result3 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result4 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result5 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result6 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result7 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result8 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result9 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result10 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result11 = 'Y'
or tkpr.action_result12 = 'Y'
) AND ( 1 = 1
AND tkpr.action_result1 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result2 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result3 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result4 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result5 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result6 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result7 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result8 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result9 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result10 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result11 != 'Y'
AND tkpr.action_result12 != 'Y'
) AND tkpr.percent != '100' order by tkpr.created_at
select * from esg.tb_safety_checklist tsc where tsc.inspection_cycle = #{searchCd} and use_yn = 'Y'

select tei.equipment_id, tei.equipment_nm, tei.comp_id, tsch.hr_id as id, thi.hr_nm as nm, tei.std_eq_id, thi.user_id, tui.clnt_id from esg.tb_equipment_info tei left join esg.tb_safety_checklist_hr tsch ON tsch.equipment_id = tei.equipment_id left join esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.hr_id = tsch.hr_id left join esg.tb_user_info tui ON thi.user_id = tui.user_id where 1 = 1 and tei.std_eq_id = #{searchText} and tei.use_yn = 'Y' and tsch.hr_id is not null order by thi.ord_seq

WITH inspections AS ( SELECT sil.write_year, sil.doc_type, sil.doc_no, scl.title, sil.std_eq_id, sil.equipment_id, ei.equipment_nm, ei.setup_location AS defaultLocation, sil.setup_location AS LOCATION, CASE WHEN sil.check_dt IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN sil.check_start IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(sil.check_start FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN sil.check_dt IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN sil.check_end IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(sil.check_end FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, sil.created_at, sil.comp_id, sil.created_by FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log sil LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist scl ON scl.comp_id = sil.comp_id AND scl.std_eq_id = sil.std_eq_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info ei ON ei.std_eq_id = sil.std_eq_id AND ei.equipment_id = sil.equipment_id AND ei.comp_id = sil.comp_id WHERE sil.check_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- :start_date, :end_date AND sil.use_yn = 'Y' ), checker AS ( -- 점검자 정보 조회 SELECT i.write_year, i.doc_type, i.doc_no, MAX(ai.hr_id) AS hr_id, MAX(ai.hr_nm) AS hr_name, MAX(ai.jbrp_nm) AS job_title, MAX(ai.orgn_nm) AS org_name, MAX(ai.updated_at) AS signed_at, SUM( CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS checker_count, SUM( CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS signed_checker_count FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = i.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(i.write_year, i.doc_no) GROUP BY i.write_year, i.doc_type, i.doc_no ), details_count AS ( -- 체크항목의 체크 여부 개수 조회 SELECT d.write_year, d.doc_type, d.doc_no, COUNT(d.doc_seq) AS details_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.acceptable_yn = 'Y' OR d.non_compliant_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checked_details_count FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail d ON d.write_year = i.write_year AND d.doc_type = i.doc_type AND d.doc_no = i.doc_no GROUP BY d.write_year, d.doc_type, d.doc_no ) SELECT CONCAT(i.write_year, '-', i.doc_type, '-', i.doc_no) AS id, COALESCE(dc.details_count, 0) AS details_count, COALESCE(dc.checked_details_count, 0) AS checked_details_count, i.title, i.comp_id, i.write_year, i.doc_type, i.doc_no, tui.user_id, tui.clnt_id, thi.hr_id, CASE WHEN COALESCE(dc.details_count, 0) <= COALESCE(dc.checked_details_count, 0) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS done, json_build_object( 'id', i.equipment_id, 'name', i.equipment_nm, 'defaultLocation', i.defaultLocation, 'typeId', i.std_eq_id ) AS checkTarget, CASE WHEN c.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', c.hr_id, 'name', c.hr_name, 'jobTitle', c.job_title, 'orgName', c.org_name, 'signedAt', c.signed_at, 'signed', CASE WHEN c.checker_count > 0 AND c.checker_count <= c.signed_checker_count THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END ) ELSE NULL END AS checker, i.started_at AS startedAt, i.ended_at AS endedAt, i.created_at AS createdAt FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN checker c ON c.write_year = i.write_year AND c.doc_type = i.doc_type AND c.doc_no = i.doc_no LEFT JOIN details_count dc ON dc.write_year = i.write_year AND dc.doc_type = i.doc_type AND dc.doc_no = i.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info tui ON i.created_by = tui.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.user_id = tui.user_id ORDER BY i.created_at DESC

SELECT tai.*, sf.file_id AS logo_id, thi.user_id AS hr_user_id, thi.user_id, tui.clnt_id, thi.hr_id, FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON tai.hr_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info tui ON thi.user_id = tui.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = tai.hr_id AND sf.target_type = 'hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d dc ON dc.major_cd = 'C0045' AND dc.minor_cd = tai.param WHERE tai.target_type = #{targetType} AND tai.target_id = #{targetId} AND tai.type = #{type} ORDER BY dc.ord_seq ASC
SELECT * FROM esg.tb_training_result_report ttrr WHERE ttrr.use_yn = 'Y'

select ttpi.doc_no, ttpi.doc_type, ttpi.write_year, ttpi.comp_id, ttrrh.hr_id, tui.user_id, tui.clnt_id, ttpi.title from esg.tb_training_plan_implementation ttpi left join esg.tb_training_result_report ttrr on ttpi.doc_no = ttrr.plan_doc_no and ttpi.doc_type = ttrr.plan_doc_type and ttpi.write_year = ttrr.plan_write_year left join esg.tb_training_result_report_hr ttrrh on ttpi.doc_no = ttrrh.doc_no and ttpi.doc_type = ttrrh.doc_type and ttpi.write_year = ttrrh.write_year left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on thi.hr_id = ttrrh.hr_id left join esg.tb_user_info tui on thi.user_id = tui.user_id where ttrr.doc_type is null and ttpi.training_date < #{startDate} and ttpi.use_yn = 'Y'
